summary: Add post-commit meta-KB synthesis hook to learning-gate.mjs — after governed commits pass validation, automatically re-runs synthesize-meta-kb.mjs to keep the index fresh
root_cause: Meta-KB index could become stale if not refreshed after new learning-updates are committed
fix_approach: Added triggerMetaKBSynthesis() function after PASS message; guards against circular amplification by checking for source: meta-kb-auto; fail-open with 30s timeout

validation.notes: Synthesis trigger is fail-open — errors are logged as warnings, never block the gate
